body.notes: Per Akien 2026-04-19 (during GH-285 close): the worker_foreman + worker_daemon.sh pattern is non-biomimetic scaffolding. Biology has no foreman — it has conditional synaptic propagation. Equivalent pattern in Igor: BOREDOM engram activates on idle → BRANCHIF guards on queue-has-pending → claim_next_ticket engram fires → BRANCHIF into pe_chain. Replace the polling daemon + Python foreman logic with engram chains using existing primitives (BRANCHIF, FORKIF, cursor_runtime). Scope: move foreman_scan/launch_next_worker/check_worker_queue logic into seeded habit chains; delete wild_igor/igor/tools/worker_foreman.py; delete lab/claudecode/worker_daemon.sh; update PROC_BOREDOM_FOREMAN / PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN to pure engrams. Requires HIGH-inertia confirmation before execution — touches habit machinery and the ticket pickup pipeline.
body.title: Retire worker_foreman + worker_daemon — express ticket pickup as a BOREDOM engram chain
body.result: Closed per Akien 2026-05-01: decision reversed — worker_foreman + worker_daemon are still load-bearing for CC dispatch (engram-chain replacement was scaffolded in Phase A/B back in April but not adopted; we kept the polling foreman for actual use cases). worker_foreman.py + worker_daemon.sh remain in tree.
